title: Its finally happened Eva and Sony Walkman collaboration
display_title: Its finally happened Eva and Sony Walkman collaboration
wikitext:
[]: It's finally happened: Eva and Sony Walkman collaboration             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Mar 22, 2014 2:31 am Minna no Eva Fan: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-2936.html Official site: http://store.sony.jp/Special/Audio/Walkman/Eva/index.html Shinji just looks so smug there! And I'm very surprised it's taken this long for that collaboration to happen! According to the front page this is just a "preview" right now. Guess we'll see the actual walkman later on. April is the release month.

[]: Re: It's finally happened: Eva and Sony Walkman collaboratio             Quote Post by CJD » Sat Mar 22, 2014 6:00 am Today I learned "Walkman" refers to a brand not portable CD/Cassette players. I couldn't find a price on there. Is there one listed?

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sat Mar 22, 2014 1:14 pm Its about time that Shinji entered the 21st century and ditched that 1995 model. Just in time for 2015 too!

[]: Re: It's finally happened: Eva and Sony Walkman collaboratio             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sat Mar 22, 2014 7:50 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Shinji just looks so smug there!

[]: t             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sat Mar 22, 2014 11:53 pm Maybe Sony wouldn't play at first and finally got tired of seeing the SDAT. Or khara came to them and said Hey, Apple's talking to us...

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Sun Mar 23, 2014 4:20 am I avowed last year not to buy an iPod ever again. I'm going to get one of these instead.

[]:             Quote Post by Yaywalter » Sun Mar 23, 2014 10:40 am So... is this, like, confirmation that Rei Q didn't pick up the SDAT at the end of 3.0?

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sun Mar 23, 2014 3:54 pm The part not in the description is each one comes with a Rei's soul locked inside.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Mar 24, 2014 7:48 am Dunno, the expression look more distantly dreamy to me... Still, this is something so abious to do, ad wise, that it's hard to believe it only occurred to them now. It's time Shinji reached the 21th century

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Mon Mar 24, 2014 7:54 am ^Aye, he just looks happy to be able to listen to some music in peace. Also, Asuka didn't just buy him a new Walkman out of the kindness of her heart in GFOS. She actually smashed his SDAT player on the train because he didn't want to talk to her. Further proof she is pure evil.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Mar 24, 2014 8:39 am ^ No that's just a proof that everyone in GoS is a clone of the characters from NGE with distorted personalities!

[]: Evangelion walkman             Quote Post by themufanman » Mon Jul 21, 2014 10:13 pm I just saw this on ebay, is it worth buying?

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Tue Jul 22, 2014 7:46 am Care to post a link or a pic mate?

[]:             Quote Post by themufanman » Tue Jul 22, 2014 11:45 am Dima wrote: Care to post a link or a pic mate?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jul 22, 2014 1:09 pm Please check for pre-existing threads before creating a new one. Merged. But as cool as the Sdat-Walkman looks, I personally don't think it's worth the price. Stuff from Japan is always so overpriced, IMO. I'm interested if the audio quality is decent, though. (See first post link). [s]You'd think for the money you have to pay, the remastered 1.0-3.0 OSTs would be included for free instead of trial listening.[/s] I misread. Trial listening was at various Sony Stores (Osaka, Ginza, Nagoya) back on Friday, May 16th. There are different plans depending on what albums you wanted to get and they included different wallpapers too. Various purchase options here . Still can't believe these were released back in April!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jul 22, 2014 2:25 pm SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Tue Jul 22, 2014 2:34 pm Darn, now where did I put my spare $600 at!?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jul 22, 2014 3:44 pm Edited my previous post because I made a few mistakes originally.
